prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical data for TMO suggests an approximate annualized mean daily return (drift) of 12% and an annualized standard deviation (volatility) of 22%. These parameters were used to model the log-normal distribution of TMO's price in 22 trading days. The point estimate is the median of this distribution, and the confidence intervals are derived from its respective percentiles.
